title: No java edition subtitle
description: Removes the "java edition" label from the main menu!
body:
## Removes the "Java edition" subheading from the main menu.

**The source package's files have version 1.21.4 written in them, but it will work with any version. Just ignore the warning that it is made for an older/newer version!**

---

![No java edition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1628feb100feb9098742186161759f4f8882117_0.webp)
